develop.headerDescription: All studies, tasks or surveys you have <0>developed or are collaborating on</0>.

adminMilestones.accessDeniedBody: You need the canManageForms permission to manage milestones.
adminMilestones.intro: Global review steps used across project boards. Edit titles, visibility, and review form key patterns. Template-scoped milestones are listed for reference.
adminMilestones.seedPanelAllMissing: Nothing seeded yet. Click below to install the four baseline milestones (Proposal Feedback, Peer Feedback, Data Collection, Project Report).
adminMilestones.seedPanelSomeMissing: Some default milestones are missing. Clicking below will only install the ones that don't already exist — your edited milestones stay untouched.
adminMilestones.empty: No milestones yet. Use the seed panel above to install defaults.
adminMilestones.editorGlobalOnly: Only global milestones can be edited here.
